features: SPECIALLY DESIGNED TO DEEP CLEAN AND REMOVE TOUGH & STUBBORN STAINS WITH OXY-LIFT STAIN TECHNOLOGY – Breaks down and lifts tough, embedded dirt and soils from carpet fibres
PREVENTS STAINS AND REDUCES THE RISK OF RE-SOILING – CarpetGuard strengthens the protective properties of the carpet and reduces the risk of re-soiling over time
NEUTRALISES PET ODOURS – Doesn’t just mask household odours but actively neutralises them leaving your home refreshed
DESIGNED FOR USE WITH ALL VAX CARPET CLEANERS – Get the best cleaning performance by always using Vax Carpet Cleaning Solutions in your Vax Carpet Cleaner
SPECIALLY FORMULATED FOR HOMES WITH PETS – Strong on stains and formulated to be used in homes with pets
description: Product Description Vax Platinum professional solution is Vax's best ever carpet cleaning solution. The unique Oxy-Lift action cleans deep in to the carpet pile and removes stubborn stains, its odour neutraliser combats pet and other smells while the Carpet Guard formulation keeps your carpets looking and feeling fresh. Vax Platinum is suitable for all Vax Carpet Washers and is Woolsafe approved. Directions Put Vax Pre-treatment Solution in the clean water tank. Plug in the wand and turn the machine on. The wand will produce a fine spray to put on the mark or stain. Leave this on your carpet for 15 minutes and then begin your full carpet wash. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets.
